<!--
PR title MUST follow Conventional Commits 1.0.0:
  <type>(optional scope): <description>
e.g.  feat(tools): add get_list_tweets
See CONTRIBUTING.md.
-->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change and why is it needed? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` — new feature/tool
- [ ] `fix` — bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — documentation
- [ ] `refactor` / `perf` / `test` / `build` / `ci` / `chore`
- [ ] Breaking change (title has `!` and/or a `BREAKING CHANGE:` footer)

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title is a valid Conventional Commit
- [ ] Tests pass (`python -m pytest tests/`)
- [ ] Docs updated if behaviour/config changed

Closes #
